results.title: The Debut
results.overview: When Mona Friedman is cast in a bit part at a small community theater, she transforms from a shy, unassuming housewife into a zealous method actor willing to do anything to protect the artistic integrity of her marginal role—even if it means waging war against the show’s domineering director.

results.title: Maldoror: The Live Performance
results.overview: Filmed and witnessed live at The Hold contained in the Shipping Forecast. The four members of Maldoror held their bands debut featuring a wide mixture of genres with both covers and originals.
